rootError.title: Something went wrong
rootError.description: We hit an unexpected problem, but your session is still safe. Try reloading this view or return home.

insurance.no_policies_body: Create your first policy to start protecting what matters most.
insurance.form_description: This policy is built as an on-chain USDC smart contract payload. Your wallet signs and submits the transaction; RemitWise only prepares the payload.
insurance.status_idle_desc: Fill in the form above and click Create Policy to register your new coverage.
insurance.status_pending_desc: Building the on-chain payload — this takes a moment.
insurance.integration_note: Insurance actions are prepared as USDC smart contract payloads. Users sign transactions locally in their wallet, and RemitWise does not custody funds.
insurance.detail_status_idle_desc: Select an action above to interact with this policy.
insurance.detail_status_pending_desc: Building the on-chain payload — this takes a moment.
insurance.pay_success_desc: Premium payment payload is ready for signing.
insurance.deactivate_success_desc: Deactivation payload is ready for signing.
insurance.pay_confirm_body: You are about to pay {{amount}} for this policy. This action cannot be undone after signing.
insurance.deactivate_confirm_body: This will permanently deactivate your policy. You will lose coverage immediately and cannot reactivate it. Are you sure?
insurance.already_deactivated: This policy has been deactivated and can no longer be modified.
insurance.error_fetch_policies: Failed to load policies. Please try again.

errors.unauthorized_missing_header: Unauthorized: missing or invalid x-user header
errors.failed_fetch_policy: Failed to fetch policy from contract
errors.failed_fetch_policies: Failed to fetch policies from contract
errors.nonce_expired: Nonce expired or missing. Please request a new nonce.
errors.goal_date_future: Target date must be in the future

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.subtitle: Track and achieve your financial dreams

familyDrawer.contractUnavailableDescription: The wallet contract endpoint is not deployed yet, so the drawer is showing the latest available card values.
familyDrawer.checkBlocked: Member has reached their spending limit
familyDrawer.noActivityDescription: This member has no spending recorded for the current cycle.
familyDrawer.emptyDescription: Select a member from the list to view details.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction History
transactionHistory.subtitleStandalone: Search, filter, and review payment, split, bill, and insurance activity with grouped results by date.
transactionHistory.searchPlaceholder: Search by transaction hash, address, or memo...
transactionHistory.searchStandalonePlaceholder: Search ID, recipient, type, status, amount
transactionHistory.filtersHelper: Search combines with every selected type and status chip.

dateGroups.earlierHelper: Older activity kept in chronological order

noResults.title: No matching transactions
noResults.description: Try clearing a filter, widening the status selection, or searching by recipient, ID, amount, or transaction type.

emptyState.title: No transaction history yet
emptyState.description: Completed transfers, splits, bill payments, and insurance activity will appear here once you make your first transaction.

rates.error: Could not load exchange rates. Please try again.

send.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
send.error_empty_amount: Amount must be greater than zero.
send.error_api: The server returned an error. Please try again.

settings.preferences_saved_description: Your settings have been saved successfully.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your public identity and contact information.
profile.full_name_hint: Your legal name as it appears on documents

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose when and how RemitWise contacts you.
notifications.transfer_confirmed_desc: When your payment reaches the recipient
notifications.transfer_failed_desc: If a payment cannot be processed
notifications.exchange_rate_alert_desc: When the rate improves by more than 2 %
notifications.bill_due_reminder_desc: 48 hours before a bill is due
notifications.goal_milestone_desc: When you hit 25 %, 50 %, 75 %, or 100 % of a goal
notifications.insurance_premium_reminders_desc: Receive alerts when insurance premiums are due or overdue.

security.title: Security
security.description: Protect your account and manage session access.
security.two_factor_alert: Two-factor authentication is not enabled. We strongly recommend enabling it for added security.
security.two_factor_desc: Require a code from your phone on each login
security.login_notifications_desc: Email me when a new device signs in
security.biometric_desc: Use Face ID or fingerprint on supported devices
security.rotate_wallet_text: Want to rotate your wallet nonce or revoke all sessions?
security.sign_out_all_label: Sign out from all devices and revoke all sessions

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.description: Manage your Stellar wallet and network settings.
wallet.auto_split_desc: Apply your Smart Money Split rules to incoming transfers

family.title: Family
family.description: Manage members, roles, and spending limits.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.display_density_hint: Adjust spacing of lists and tables

insurance_reminders.title: Insurance reminders
insurance_reminders.description: Show upcoming or overdue premium payments for your active policies.
insurance_reminders.empty: No reminders in the next 7 days.
insurance_reminders.unauthorized_error: Connect your wallet to view upcoming insurance reminders.

family_wallets.add_member_description: The form is visually ready for engineering handoff and keeps the disabled state explicit until contract integration is connected.
family_wallets.integration_required_text: Connect the `family_wallet` smart contract and wallet to add members, update spending limits, and enforce permissions non-custodially. Each change is prepared as an on-chain payload and signed locally.

family_member_section.title: Family Members
family_member_section.description: Highest-utilization members surface first so limit reviews are faster on mobile and desktop alike.

family_member_card.description: Monthly wallet usage, remaining headroom, and permissions in one place.

family_wallets_stats.active_members_footnote: Recipients and senders stay visible at a glance.
family_wallets_stats.average_utilization_footnote: Use this to spot which members need limit reviews first.
family_wallets_stats.coverage_footnote: Reserve admin access for the smallest possible group.

approvals_queue.title: Pending Approvals
approvals_queue.description: Member-management transactions waiting for co-signer review. Each item must collect the required signatures before it executes on-chain.
approvals_queue.empty_description: Member actions you initiate will appear here for co-signer review.
approvals_queue.footer: Transactions expire after 30 minutes if not signed. Connect your wallet to sign pending approvals.
approvals_queue.wallet_disconnected_desc: Connect your wallet to sign pending approvals.

understanding_roles.title: Understanding Roles
understanding_roles.description: Match each member to the narrowest permission set that supports their task. This keeps the most important decisions visible without making the section feel like policy text.
understanding_roles.assignment_tip_text: Default to {{recipient}} for spend-only access, use {{sender}} for members who initiate transfers, and keep {{admin}} limited to the smallest trusted group.

sender.name: Sender
sender.summary: Starts transfers, funds household needs, and tracks outgoing activity.
sender.best_for: Adults who send or approve payments
sender.permission_1: Create transfers and fund shared expenses
sender.permission_2: Review utilization before new remittances go out
sender.permission_3: Coordinate with recipients without changing global settings

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.summary: Receives money and spends within a defined monthly limit.
recipient.best_for: Dependents or members with managed allowances
recipient.permission_1: Receive wallet funds with contract guardrails
recipient.permission_2: Stay within a clearly visible spending ceiling
recipient.permission_3: Avoid admin complexity for routine usage

admin.name: Admin
admin.summary: Manages permissions, spending policies, and family-wide settings.
admin.best_for: Trusted owners coordinating the whole wallet
admin.permission_1: Update roles and member-level spending limits
admin.permission_2: Review exceptions, edge cases, and account health
admin.permission_3: Handle contract setup and governance tasks
